value_chain_position: Microsoft 365 and multi-cloud data management/governance SaaS — sells backup, migration, compliance, and governance tooling for M365, Teams, Salesforce, and Google Workspace environments; the data-resilience layer on top of hyperscaler productivity platforms.
relative_comps: AVPT is the leading third-party governance and compliance layer for the Microsoft 365 ecosystem, with 27% YoY growth and 24% FCF margin at $444M revenue. Its specialization in M365 data governance gives it relevance as enterprises confront AI copilot data-sprawl compliance requirements. However, MSFT natively provides competing governance features (Purview) and AVPT depends on MSFT's platform decisions — load-bearing score is constrained by platform dependency. Versus Commvault (CVLT), AVPT is more M365-specialized and growing faster. The $2.2B mcap looks reasonable for the growth/FCF profile but the MSFT concentration risk is non-trivial.
